title: Last update - to get a chart view
excerpt:

This could be from LAst update and would help to see every update of “last update” : …

posts.author: Florian22630 (Florian DUROUSSET)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for a way to create a Chart view that will show all the updates made by each of the team members in the past month or so.
This could be from LAst update and would help to see every update of “last update” :

  • who did it
  • when he did it

this can help to keep track on the activity of the sales rep for example
